mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_INFO WHERE UI_EMAIL = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) AS CNT FROM USER_INFO WHERE UI_EMAIL = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG ( UCEL_UI_EMAIL, UCEL_UI_NAME, UCEL_AUTH_CODE, UCEL_REG_DATE ) VALUES( #{email}, #{name}, #{auth_code}, now() );
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_CERTIFICATION_EMAIL_LOG SET UCEL_AUTH_YN = 'Y', UCEL_AUTH_DATE = now() WHERE UCEL_UI_EMAIL = #{email}, UCEL_UI_NAME = #{name}, UCEL_AUTH_CODE = #{auth_code}
